title: Smart Brief Panel — Morning Brief in Home Chat Modal
context: The general chat modal (bottom nav chat icon, Home route) currently opens to an empty chat. This replaces that empty state with a Smart Brief panel showing all 3 markets (US, Finland, Vietnam) with recap data, watchlist, and cross-market questions. Favourites are cosmetic only — the brief always shows regardless of favourite count. Tapping a market block replaces the brief with that market's recap detail + thread composer using the real recap chat API. Ticker detail page chat is unchanged.

decisions.data_source: Aggregate existing /api/markets/{market}/recaps client-side. Daily first, weekly fallback.
decisions.heuristic: favCount per market → locale tie-break → US fallback. Determines primary (hero) vs secondary (collapsed). All 3 markets always shown.
decisions.recap_tap: Replace brief with recap detail view (RecapContextCard + dig-deeper questions + thread composer). Reuses existing RecapChatModal pattern.
decisions.brief_visibility: Shows on Home route chat when threads.length === 0. Previous threads → show threads directly.
decisions.favourites_role: Cosmetic only — 'N favourites here' labels, watchlist section visibility, primary ranking.
decisions.recap_caching: React Query useQuery per market, ~5 min stale time.
decisions.header: Shows 'Your morning brief' title + 'Focused on {primary}' subtitle + sun icon. 'Back to brief' button in thread body per design.

milestones.title: Market Pulse Cards — Primary Hero + Secondary Accordion
milestones.description: Render the top section of the Smart Brief: data hooks, primary PulseCard hero, secondary CollapsedMarketRows with accordion, section labels. Wire into BottomNavigation chat modal as children of ChatboxUI. Header shows brief title/subtitle.

attaches correct favouriteCount per market

green.types: BriefMarket { key, label, flag, backendCode, indexLabel, favouriteCount }, BriefMarketsResult { primary, secondaries }
green.notes: Hardcode INDEX_LABELS: { USA: 'S&P 500', Finland: 'OMXH25', Vietnam: 'VN-Index' }. Pure useMemo, no side effects.

tasks.refactor: Extract pure pickPrimaryMarket() function for easier unit testing without renderHook.

green.notes: React Query useQuery per market with ~5 min stale time. Fetch from /api/markets/{backendCode}/recaps same as MarketRecapIsland.tsx line 46.

milestones.title: Watchlist Section — 'On your watchlist'
milestones.description: Render the cross-market watchlist section below the pulse cards. Shows favourite companies sorted primary-market-first with market flags. Display only (no tap handler). Hidden when 0 favourites.

edge_cases: Market with no recap data: PulseCard/Row shows 'No recap available' state
0 favourites: Brief still shows all 3 markets, watchlist hidden, fav count labels hidden
Favourites changing while brief open: useMemo recalculates
Empty recap.questions: no question chips rendered
Long headlines: line-clamp-3 on PulseCard, first sentence on collapsed row
Dark mode: uses existing CSS vars
